title: Added Origins
description: This mod gives you more origins to the origins mod (Forge and Fabric)
body:
4.0.0 Pre-release is here!!!

[Added Origins Discord](https://discord.gg/c6AkpNgehG)

### Warning:
This mod no longer supports Forge and doesn't support Fabric after 1.17 for version 3.1.0 and under
![Added Origins](https://i.imgur.com/LHto35Z.png)

Ever wanted even more origins? Well now you can have them

Introducing the "Added Origins" Mod
## Current Origins (Soon to change)
![origins list](https://i.imgur.com/PYKiVfa.png)

<details>
<summary>Current Origins List</summary>
  
- Giant
  - A larger origin focused around Brute Strength
- Caverner
  - A humanoid-based origin that lives in the caverns
  - Extermely good at caving
- Xestrial
  - A Crystal-like Origin that is based upon movement
- Endermite
  - You will turn into an endermite
  - Good at movement/teleportation
  - Bad with water
- Roach
  - An extremely small, but durable critter
  - Fall damage is your worst enemy
- Necromancer
  - The summoner of mobs
  - You are immune to mobs
- Cowsian
  - You are now a cow
  - Mobs don't see you as a threat (except for creepers, who run from you)
- Zythl
  - A lava-like origin that hates water
  - Heat fuels the Zythl to be stronger
- Silverfish
  - A more Cave-based Endermite (without teleportation)
- Lakor Healer
  - The Lakor's had healers all over the place till they nearly went extinct
  - (NO LONGER ACTIVE)
- Lakor Warrior
  - The Lakor's always had an abundance of skilled warriors.
  - They are very effective in combat
- Rat
  - A rat, with surprisingly good taste
- Megalodon
  - A large fish that is extremely fast in water, and is generally terrifying when paired with depth strider
- Dakor Warrior
  - The Dakors were direct competitors of the Lakors. In the war, the Dakors won because of their fighting expertise, alongside their mages.
  - The Dakors are extremely angry and always have a sort of built up rage
- Dakor Mage
  - Extremely beneficial when paired with others of the Dakor class
  - Able to shoot magic attacks at opponents
- Dakor Healer
  - The Dakor Healer doesn't do much, but has an extremely large healing radius.


HALLOWEEN ORIGINS:
- Pumpkineer
  - An origin focused on harvesting souls for its own benefit.
  - You can never sleep, nor can you naturally regenerate. Instead, you are always forced to harvest souls
- Illusionist
  - An origin with deep ties to the Illager Family
  - Able to summon Illusioner squadrons at will.
- Buried
  - A buried soul that still roams
  - You live in the ground, bound to it
  - You find joy in giving others your same fate
- Jumpscar
  - An origin focused purely on scaring others
  - At will, the "Jumpscar" can send enemies straight to the nether with a single punch.
  - In a last resort, the Jumpscar can run away and blind everyone in a large radius.

</details>



### Credits:
- Heatup__ - Contributor
- Czarnick14 - Translator
- BatEnderGleb - Translator

### Dependencies:
- Fabric API
- Origins
- Pehkui
